title: EXTRASTAR Outdoor Wall Lights with Sensor, PIR Lights Outdoor Solar Powered, Stainless Steel IP44 Water Resistant for Front Door Porch Patio Garden Hallway
features: 【Solar Powered Wall Light】100mA Solar panel, just charging 8-10 hrs for the outside lights with sensor, up to 30 hrs long runtime in 10% dim mode (4LM) or 3hrs at 100% brightness (40LM)

【Motion Sensor Light Outdoor】 Max 6m Range and 120°Angle, wide coverage with 20-30 seconds auto-off delay. The outdoor wall lights solar powered with motion sensor is deal for porch, front door, garden, pathway and security areas

【Weather-resistant and Durable】IP44 water resistant rating withstands rain and dust. The outside security lights with sensor is durable for year-round outdoor use. PS: Don’t soak in rain for a long time
【Bright Led Wall Light】4x2835 SMD Led chips, 6500K cool white light, provide 40LM brightness. Crafted stainless steel material adds a touch of elegance to the decoration
【User-Friendly】Compact size of 16.2x8x26.5cm for easy installation, no wiring needed, solar powered for hassle-free setup
description: Illuminate your outdoor spaces effortlessly with the EXTRASTAR Solar-Powered PIR Motion Sensor Wall Light. Crafted from elegant stainless steel with IP44 weather resistance, the outdoor sensor lights is built to withstand the elements in your garden, patio, garage, or hallway. Its efficient solar panel charges in just 8-10 hours, providing up to 30 hours of dim (10%) light or 3 hours of bright (100%, 40LM) illumination. The smart PIR sensor detects movement within a 6-metre range and 120° angle, automatically switching on the bright 6500K cool white LEDs for 20-30 seconds. Compact, wireless, and incredibly easy to install, it offers reliable, energy-saving security and convenience.

specifications_table.Specific Uses: ‎Front Door, Porch, Garden, Patio, Garage, Hallway
